use_codes.desc: USE IN COMBINATION WITH METHYLPREDNISOLONE FOR THE TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH PROSTATE CANCER

indications.text:
YONSA is indicated in combination with methylprednisolone for the treatment of patients with metastatic castration-
resistant prostate cancer.
